Functions for writing and checking the boot FPGA bitstream status.

# Purpose
This C header file declares two functions related to the management of FPGA bitstream boot information. The function [`mfg_info_write_boot_fpga_bitstream`](<#mfg_info_write_boot_fpga_bitstream>) is intended to write or set the boot FPGA bitstream, although the implementation details are not provided in this file. The function [`mfg_info_is_boot_fpga_bitstream_written`](<#mfg_info_is_boot_fpga_bitstream_written>) returns a boolean value indicating whether the boot FPGA bitstream has been successfully written. The file includes the `stdbool.h` header to support the use of the `bool` data type. The `#pragma once` directive is used to prevent multiple inclusions of this header file in a single compilation unit.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdbool.h`
